checks.description: When valid_out is asserted, dout must reflect a deterministic bit derived from the most recent parallel input d and must remain stable for at least one clock cycle.
notes: Conservative guard: does not assume exact cycle latency between d and dout, only requires observable stability while valid_out is high.
checks.pass_condition: If valid_out == 1 then dout is not X/Z and does not change until valid_out deasserts.

unresolved_items: valid_ready-like signal valid_out has no matching ready; handshake semantics remain unresolved.
